/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/core/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/core/editor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/core/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/core/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/util/bvh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/util/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vcontext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vcore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vdata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vgeneral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vmetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vscheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vshaders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vstir.dir/vulkan/vutil.cpp.o -o ../bin/vstir  /usr/lib/libvulkan.so ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a ../_deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a ../libimgui.a ../_deps/nfd-build/src/libnfd.a /usr/lib/libvulkan.so ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libgtk-3.so /usr/lib/libgdk-3.so /usr/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/libatk-1.0.so /usr/lib/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libz.so
